title: manifest.json (plan/sub-plan) runtime body-structure contract
description: Hook-consumable runtime artifact / type-allowlist marker for plan-tree manifest.json files. Delegates full validation to schemas/plan-manifest-schema.json (JSON Schema 2020-12 conditional-on-status). Prose-prohibited per Plan 81 SP13 Session 2 A23 + A24 manifest field additions. Authored by SP14 Batch A T-13.6 (2026-05-18).

_design_notes.consumer: hooks/pre-write-guard.sh (R-27 + prose-prohibited check) + librarian plan-index + plan-archive + backlog-index
_design_notes.lockstep_pair: tasks.md (R-37 coupled via manifest.tasks[]) + spec.md (R-37 coupled via spec_path) + schemas/plan-manifest-schema.json
_design_notes.evolution_protocol: R-37 atomic lockstep with tasks.md + plan-manifest-schema.json

prose_prohibited_rule: NO narrative prose values; multi-sentence values DENY. Manifest is structured machine-consumable data — narrative belongs in spec.md / handoff.md / 00-ideation-brief.md.
validation_strategy: JSON Schema 2020-12 conditional if/then on `status` field
references_schema_rationale: Delegate full validation to the referenced schema; this file-type-contract is the type-allowlist marker + prose-prohibition declaration.
